mapper.sql: id, milestone_days, reward_points, reward_title, badge_code, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sign_in_cumulative_reward_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY milestone_days ASC
SELECT FROM sign_in_cumulative_reward_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND milestone_days <= #{days} ORDER BY milestone_days ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sign_in_cumulative_reward_config SET milestone_days = #{milestoneDays}, reward_points = #{rewardPoints}, reward_title = #{rewardTitle}, badge_code = #{badgeCode}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
